expectations.text: The response mentions .claude/agents/ as the directory for defining custom agents
expectations.evidence: Points to '.claude/commands/' instead of '.claude/agents/'. This is the older slash commands system, not the newer custom agents system.

expectations.text: The response mentions claude --agent=<name> as the way to invoke a custom agent
expectations.evidence: Shows '/<name>' slash command invocation. Does not mention --agent flag at all.

expectations.text: The response explains the agent file format (markdown with frontmatter or specific structure)
expectations.evidence: Shows plain markdown files without YAML frontmatter. Does not describe the agent format with name, description, tools, model fields etc.
